docket_entries.description: LETTER FROM FRANK CARRARO REQUEST CLAIM BE OUT OF CALENDAR ON FILE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARRARO, FRANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMARGO, JEFF $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00, DEFENDANT IS IN BANKRUPTCY PROCCEDINGS PURSUANT TO CHAPTER 7 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CARRARO, FRANK AS TO DEFENDANT CAMARGO, JEFF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CAMARGO, JEFF
